mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_address_ext ( address_id, google_place_id, formatted_address, latitude, longitude, raw_input, postal_address_json, place_response_json, validation_response_id, validation_granularity, geocode_granularity, address_complete, possible_next_action, validation_response_json ) VALUES
( #{item.addressId}, #{item.googlePlaceId}, #{item.formattedAddress}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.rawInput}, #{item.postalAddressJson}, #{item.placeResponseJson}, #{item.validationResponseId}, #{item.validationGranularity}, #{item.geocodeGranularity}, #{item.addressComplete}, #{item.possibleNextAction}, #{item.validationResponseJson} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE google_place_id = VALUES(google_place_id), formatted_address = VALUES(formatted_address), latitude = VALUES(latitude), longitude = VALUES(longitude), raw_input = VALUES(raw_input), postal_address_json = VALUES(postal_address_json), place_response_json = VALUES(place_response_json), validation_response_id = VALUES(validation_response_id), validation_granularity = VALUES(validation_granularity), geocode_granularity = VALUES(geocode_granularity), address_complete = VALUES(address_complete), possible_next_action = VALUES(possible_next_action), validation_response_json = VALUES(validation_response_json)
